content.full_text:
March 22, 1991

TRANSMITTED BY FACSIMILE
(916) 327-2026

Fair Political Practices Commission
Sacramento, California

Dear Members of the Commission:

A situation has arisen that requires clarification from the Fair Political Practices Commission.

May a legislator transfer contributions from a campaign account to their operating account or re-election account? If funds are raised to retire a campaign debt and there is a surplus, can those funds be transferred to another account, such as an operating account? Do any limits apply; and if so, how much?

Thanking you in advance for your attention. We would appreciate your answer or determination in writing as quickly as possible. Please respond by return facsimile at (213) 382-7212.

Sincerely,

Michelle Maravich
Michelle Maravich
